input.background: We have established a scenario in which four patients are treated with an intervention that is successful 75% of the time. The number of patients who respond to treatment is a binomial random variable with parameters n = 4 and p = 0.75. It follows that probability of a failure = 1 - p = 1 - 0.75 = 0.25.
input.question: What is the probability of observing no successes among the four treatments?
